top_signals.title: Policy paper: National Wealth Fund Framework Document
top_signals.summary: This document sets out the accountabilities and relationships between the National Wealth Fund (NWF), the Shareholder (HM Treasury) and the Shareholder Representative (UK Government Investments).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Is Zack Polanski’s honeymoon over?
top_signals.summary: Green Party leader Zack Polanski’s approval ratings have dived as scrutiny over his past experiences has put him in an awkward position.  City AM/Freshwater Strategy polling has shown that Polanski’s approval ratings have dropped from a high of -5 in March to as low as -23 in this month’s data.  On a monthly basis, his [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto investment firm Keyrock is acquiring bankrupt lender Blockfills
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Resona sets up team to address artificial intelligence security risks
top_signals.summary: With U.S. startup Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI model in mind, the team will focus on gathering information and developing measures to enhance security systems.

top_signals.title: Afghan finance officials targeted by suspected Pakistani cyberespionage campaign
top_signals.summary: A suspected Pakistan-linked hacking group has targeted Afghanistan's Ministry of Finance and provincial government officials in a new cyberespionage campaign, researchers have found.
